label: Write your day-3 payment reminder email
use_case: Send this email on the third day after a customer left a review asking for feedback.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Quick Question About Your Recent Review

Dear [CUSTOMER NAME],

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with us! I hope this message finds you well.

We’d love to know more about your visit. Could you please take a moment to rate and review us on [REVIEW PLATFORM]? Your feedback helps other customers make informed decisions when choosing our services.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply directly to this email.

Thank you for being part of the [BUSINESS NAME] family!

Best regards,
[OWNER NAME]
[OWNER EMAIL]

label: Create a social media post about reviews
use_case: Post this on your business’s Facebook or Instagram page to encourage more people to leave reviews.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

[DATE/TIME]

🌟 [BUSINESS NAME] is growing thanks to our amazing customers like YOU! 🌟

We’re excited to see that so many of you are leaving wonderful reviews on [REVIEW PLATFORM]. If you’ve had a fantastic experience, we’d love for more people to know about it!

Please take a moment to share your thoughts with us. Your review can help others make the right decision when choosing where to get services from.

Thank you so much for supporting us! 🙏

#reviews #feedback #supportlocal

label: Write an email to send to regular customers
use_case: Send this email to your loyal clients reminding them of the importance of leaving a review.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Share Your Experience with Us!

Dear [CUSTOMER NAME],

I hope you’re doing well and enjoying all that life has to offer! At [BUSINESS NAME], we value each one of our customers, especially those who choose us for their needs.

Your satisfaction is what drives us every day. To help others find the best services or products, could you consider leaving a review on [REVIEW PLATFORM]? Your honest feedback can make a huge difference in someone else’s decision to try out our offerings.

Thank you so much for your support and trust!

Best,
[OWNER NAME]
[BUSINESS PHONE NUMBER]

label: Design a QR code linking to reviews

Dear [CUSTOMER NAME],

Thank you so much for choosing us! Your support means a lot to us.

Your feedback will help others make informed decisions and strengthen our community. If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply directly to this email.

label: Write a review request follow-up message
use_case: Send this message after someone has left a review asking if they can improve their rating or add more details.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Enhance Your Review!

Dear [CUSTOMER NAME],

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us! We’re delighted that you enjoyed your visit.

Would you be willing to take a moment and enhance your review on [REVIEW PLATFORM]? Your detailed feedback can provide valuable insights for other customers considering our services.

If you have any more questions or need assistance, feel free to reply directly to this email.

Thank you again!

Best regards,
[OWNER NAME]
[BUSINESS PHONE NUMBER]
